tasks.prompt: Add a health endpoint for the FastAPI backend by creating a route module under backend/app/api/routes/ and wiring it into the existing API router. Register the new router in backend/app/api/main.py. Add route coverage in backend/tests/api/routes/test_health.py that exercises the health endpoint through the FastAPI app.

Add an admin audit log endpoint for the FastAPI backend by creating a route module under backend/app/api/routes/ for audit access. Register the new router in backend/app/api/main.py. Add route coverage in backend/tests/api/routes/test_admin_audit.py for the admin audit endpoint.

Add an OAuth callback endpoint for the FastAPI backend by creating a route module under backend/app/api/routes/ to handle the callback flow. Register the new router in backend/app/api/main.py. Add route coverage in backend/tests/api/routes/test_oauth_callback.py for the OAuth callback endpoint.

Extend backend/app/core/config.py with SMTP timeout and TLS-related settings for the FastAPI service configuration. Keep the change scoped to backend/app/core/config.py and make the new settings available through the existing settings model.

Add a request-logging toggle to backend/app/core/config.py and wire that setting through backend/app/main.py so application startup can use it. Keep the configuration change anchored in backend/app/core/config.py and the app wiring change in backend/app/main.py.
